summary: Iteration 9 testing completed. Bug fix #1 (Holiday delete) and Enhancement #2 (Allocations grouped by staff member) both verified working correctly. Holiday CRUD operations (create/delete) fully functional via frontend. Allocations page redesign working with Collapsible components, grouped by staff member, expand/collapse all buttons, and search functionality.

issues: All allocations show 'Unknown' for resource_name and project_name - this is expected per agent context (orphaned data from previous DB state, not a code bug)

passed_tests: Backend: Login with don@ddconsult.tech / Welcome123! (super_admin) - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/holidays returns 3 holidays (Christmas Day, Boxing Day, New Years Day)
Backend: POST /api/holidays creates new holiday successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/holidays/{id} deletes holiday successfully (FIX VERIFIED)
Backend: GET /api/allocations returns 36 allocations with enriched fields (resource_name, resource_role, project_name, client_name)
Frontend: Login page loads and authentication works
Frontend: Holidays page loads with data-testid='holidays-page'
Frontend: Add Holiday button (data-testid='add-holiday-button') opens dialog
Frontend: Add Holiday dialog (data-testid='add-holiday-dialog') contains name and date inputs
Frontend: Holiday name input (data-testid='holiday-name-input') accepts input
Frontend: Holiday date input (data-testid='holiday-date-input') accepts date
Frontend: Holiday form submission creates new holiday (toast: 'Holiday added successfully')
Frontend: Delete holiday button removes holiday from list (toast: 'Holiday deleted successfully')
Frontend: holiday.id correctly used in delete handler (Holidays.js line 153)
Frontend: Allocations page loads with data-testid='allocations-page'
Frontend: Allocations grouped by staff member (5 resource groups found)
Frontend: Collapsible components working with expand/collapse icons
Frontend: Expand All button (data-testid='expand-all-btn') expands all groups
Frontend: Collapse All button (data-testid='collapse-all-btn') collapses all groups
Frontend: Search input (data-testid='allocation-search') filters results
Frontend: Add Allocation button (data-testid='add-allocation-button') opens dialog
Frontend: Allocation dialog (data-testid='allocation-dialog') contains Resource, Project, dates, percentage fields
Frontend: 36 allocation rows visible after Expand All

success_rate.backend: 100% (4/4 holiday endpoints tested, allocations endpoint verified)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Holiday CRUD, Allocations grouped view, expand/collapse, search all working)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_UI_Holiday for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified in iteration 9: (1) Holiday delete now works - Holidays.js uses holiday.id instead of holiday._id at line 153, (2) Allocations page redesigned with grouping by staff member using Collapsible components from shadcn/ui. Note: All 36 existing allocations show 'Unknown' names because they reference deleted resources/projects (orphaned data, not a code bug).

features: Grouped by staff member using groupedAllocations useMemo
Resource cards showing allocation percentage, utilization badge, project count
Individual allocation rows with edit/delete actions

backend_enrichment.note: Shows 'Unknown' for orphaned allocations referencing deleted resources/projects
